tool.name: indeed_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple job queries on Indeed in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling indeed_search_jobs multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'software engineer,data analyst,product manager'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated job search queries (e.g. 'frontend developer,backend engineer,devops')

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Optional location filter applied to all searches (e.g. 'Remote', 'New York, NY')
